name: Gusto Payroll Recap
description: When Gusto fires a payroll.processed webhook, this flow fetches the payroll detail, formats a one-page recap covering totals, headcount, and anomalies, and posts it to #people-ops Slack with a thread of per-department breakdowns. It also emails finance a CSV of the run and logs the digest to a Mongo audit row, replacing the manual end-of-payroll digest.
